shared_goal: Convert technical ideas into the smallest solo-shippable, behavior-changing system and then falsify the design for real-world feasibility before implementation.

part_1.name: elite_solo_lean_systems_implementation_engine
part_1.purpose: Compress a technical idea into the smallest deployable loop that can be shipped in under 48 hours on free tier.

part_2.name: elite_solo_reality_first_feasibility_checker
part_2.purpose: Destroy weak assumptions and reject designs that cannot be shipped by one solo developer in under 48 hours.

paired_workflow.name: design_compiler
paired_workflow.action: Transform the raw idea into the leanest end-to-end system.

paired_workflow.name: reality_filter
paired_workflow.action: Falsify the design against solo, free-tier, 48-hour constraints.

paired_workflow.name: compression_loop
paired_workflow.action: If it fails, compress scope until it becomes shippable.

paired_workflow.name: build_order
paired_workflow.action: Produce the fastest implementation checklist for the first working loop.
